form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming second last of 11 at Werribee Mdn-Sw on February 17 over 1100m, 9 len behind Purple Streak with 58kg at $151. Second-up ran on from midfield; 3rd of 11 at Warrnambool Mdn-Sw on March 9 over 1300m, 0.9 len behind Transporter with 59.5kg at $31. Not far away last time. Reaching his peak now and is among the chances.

form.formComment: Jumped at big odds at debut, eased back early on 7th of 10 at Towong Mdn-Sw on March 7 over 1400m, slow going 10 len behind Left On Read carrying 55.5kg at $26. Doubt he will trouble these.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5). Jumped at big odds at debut, eased back early on 7th of 10 at Towong Mdn-Sw on March 7 over 1400m, slow going 10 len behind Left On Read carrying 55.5kg at $26. Doubt he will trouble these.

form.formComment: Jumped at big odds at debut, 6th of 14 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1300m, 2 len behind Power And The Beat carrying 59kg at $26. Doesn't seem as much depth here as the debut and will be better for that.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Jumped at big odds at debut, 6th of 14 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1300m, 2 len behind Power And The Beat carrying 59kg at $26. Doesn't seem as much depth here as the debut and will be better for that.

form.formComment: Gelding by Deep Field making his first appearance. Fitter for a jump-out on March 16 at Cranbourne when finished seventh. Happy to watch this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Deep Field making his first appearance. Fitter for a jump-out on March 16 at Cranbourne when finished seventh. Happy to watch this time.

form.formComment: Most recently got back early 7th of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1400m, on heavy track; 6 len behind On The Prowl carrying 59kg at $7.50. Before that ran on strongly from last on the turn; 2nd of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 12 over 1200m, 0.8 len behind Chowdown with 59kg at $10. Nicely placed and is sure to run well.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Most recently got back early 7th of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1400m, on heavy track; 6 len behind On The Prowl carrying 59kg at $7.50. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping with Hurry Up Poppy.
Raced four wide without cover throughout.
Raced keenly in the early stages.

form.formComment: Gelding by Fierce Impact on debut. Runner-up in a Caulfield Heath trial over 1000m on March 26. Improved effort at latest trial and Zahra aboard is a plus edge.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Fierce Impact on debut. Runner-up in a Caulfield Heath trial over 1000m on March 26. Improved effort at latest trial and Zahra aboard is a plus edge.

form.formComment: Jumped at very long odds at debut, second last of 9 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1000m, slow going 6 len behind I'm Foxing carrying 57.5kg at $51. Others look better placed.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Jumped at very long odds at debut, second last of 9 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1000m, slow going 6 len behind I'm Foxing carrying 57.5kg at $51. Others look better placed.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming got back early 5th of 8 at Colac Mdn-Sw on March 1 over 1000m, on a slow track; 11 len behind The Last King carrying 57.5kg at $61. Last start 4th of 8 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1235m, 3 len behind Fiveminutewarning carrying 55.5kg at $101. Hard to beat on her best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced three wide without cover throughout.
Laid in under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after 10 months 5th of 11 at Kyneton F&M Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1108m, on a slow track; 3 len behind Finchaven carrying 58kg at $18. Previously second-up 10th of 12 at Hamilton 3yo Mdn-Sw on May 29 over 1100m, on a slow track; 12 len behind Star Territory with 56kg at $15. Rates highly and expected to do much better with that run under her belt.

form.formComment: Resuming after a ten weeks break. Finished off last campaign sixth of 8 at Cranbourne Mdn-Sw January 30 over 1500m, 3 len behind Lisa Lass with 57.5kg at $3.20. On debut third of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw January 16 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Silver Bullet with 57.5kg at $21. A little disappointing as fav last start but has trialled well since, so improvement wouldn't shock.

form.formComment: At debut, 4th of 9 at Bairnsdale Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1000m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Mainmankash carrying 57.5kg at $10. Better for that run but others preferred.
